rulings.Case Title: TRUC LAM ET AL VS. LI QUN WU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Memorandum Of Costs Or Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs LI QUN WU, XIUFEN YING's Motion To Strike Memorandum Of Costs Or Tax Costs GRANTED. Per proof of service filed on July 18, 2017 the opposition has not been served on the cross-complainant/moving party. Therefore, opposition is stricken and the motion to strike is GRANTED. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Extend Time Within Which To Issue Re Occupancy Notices To The Former Tenants At The Bristol Hotel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR's Motion To Extend Time Within Which To Issue Re Occupancy Notices To The Former Tenants At The Bristol Hotel DENIED. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: AMITABHO CHATTOPADHYAY VS. MICHAEL ROWELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF AMITABHO CHATTOPADHYAY's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the Second Affirmative defense is overruled. Demurrer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend for Defendant to allege facts to support each affirmative defense. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: PETER Y SO ET AL VS. LI FU YAO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interoggs; Special Interoggs; Req For Production Of Docs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs LI YAO, LI WANG, QING LIN's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interoggs; Special Interoggs; Req For Production Of Docs GRANTED subject to opposition. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
